articles.value: Embracing My Inner Rakdos, With Two Reanimator Decks
articles.excerpt: Owain shows off his latest color identity exploration by exploring two similar Rakdos Reanimator decks, one of which is all Universes Beyond.

articles.value: Building a Budget Green Goblin, Revenant Commander Deck
articles.excerpt: Let's build the new Green Goblin, Revenant, from Marvel's Spider-Man, on a budget. We're discarding for profit - and fun!

articles.value: Myth Realized - Should We Bring Back Banned Only As Commander?
articles.excerpt: Have you ever wondered what could happen if the 10 banned legendary creatures could be your commander?

articles.value: Back to Basics - The Top 10 Most Played Rakdos Cards in Commander
articles.excerpt: And now for the most entertaining Top 10 list of them all! It's our Top 10 Most Played Rakdos Cards in Commander.

articles.value: Outlaws of Thunder Junction - Rakdos, the Muscle Deck Tech
articles.excerpt: New, from Outlaws of Thunder Junction. It's Rakdos, the Muscle, a new legend that turns creature sacrifice into card advantage. Check out the full deck tech here!
